reviews.review_description: Seems to repeat same thing almost daily need more variety

developer_response.body: Hi, the game is short, it's 4 nights only.  sorry for the disappointment.

reviews.review_description:
All I can say is wow
As a person who has played duck hunt thru the years this one is top notch
The graphics are awesome and the gameplay is top notch 
I like this one as it uses all the bells and whistles of vr
Looks and plays like true vr and the additional tasks like alligator and racoon attacks bring a new dimension to the duck hunt style making this a true updated version of a classic game
Fun and challenging

developer_response.body: Glad you liked the game, thank you very much for the kind words, have a wonderful day!

reviews.review_description: Great! Awesome

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for leaving a review, glad your enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_description:
I'm not a hunter in real life, but I enjoyed playing this game.  Shooting the ducks, crows, rabbits, wolves & gators makes it a great game.  

It changes from day to night back to the day and repeats several times giving you a different atmosphere to play in. 

I'd like to see more levels with more difficulty levels and new challenges.  Add things like geese, deer, and moose to the game.  

You need to change up the patterns more.  Maybe have the gators & wolves attack from different locations instead of the exact same each time. 

UPDATE:  It's been 4 years since the last update.  It would be nice if you could continue working on this game and improving it, adding more levels and different types of levels.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks a lot for taking the time and leaving your detail feedback, I can't promise anything yet, but I will keep your feedback in mind.

reviews.review_description: I like the game so far but couldn't play more than 3-4 attempts. First thing that annoyed me - Game timeout is too short. Game gets over even before you get a grasp of it. Timeout should be longer and should be an option. Second thing is the loading time. It should be quick after the first load. Any alerts/hints about crows etc. should be part of the instructions board. Other than that - Gun shots are not perfect. Doesn't tell you number of shots left. Graphics can be improved. Loading animation could be better as it looks weird with those arrows.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for taking the time and leaving your feedback, I only have on tip for the " number of shots left", you can hear the sound when you shoot, at the last two bullets, you hear a click if you listen carefully.

reviews.review_title: A "must have" game for all beginners
reviews.review_description: The atmosphere in Legendary Hunter VR is incredibly well done. The gameplay isn't overly complex, making it the perfect game to introduce friends and family to the magic of virtual reality. Tip: wait for a pitch-black night in the game, then shoot one of the hives. The light it creates might just save you from a heart attack when the wolves arrive! :p

developer_response.body: Thank you for your warm review, Glad you liked it, I use this game to introduce new people to VR too since its stationary and has no sudden action that could hurt them or break my tv :)

reviews.review_title: Duck hunting while getting eaten by bear
reviews.review_description: I bought this game because everyone’s favorite game on the Oculus Go was Duck Hunter. But even though many people paid for the game, we could not re-download the game after the headset was reset. I do like the similarity to the Oculus Go Duck Hunter but having to shoot bears in the dark is scary and by the third night having to look for black bears in the pitch black. Night, only to be eaten is disturbing. Please give some light at night and can you please release the Oculus Go Duck Hunter as an add on. That game was awesome and so much fun to play. Yes it was simple but very relaxing and no bears or crocodiles tried to eat me

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for leaving a review, unfortunately I'm not sure which Oculus Go game you are referring as I'm not the dev behind it.

reviews.review_description:
I had a blast with this game, really good fun.  Lots of secrets and achievements to unlock.  

People need to give it more of a chance and play through all of the levels!

Hope to see more from this developer, so many nice touches and hope we get some updates and more content 👌👍

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time and leaving a review, glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_title: Even a demo game has more content
reviews.review_description:
Player for 10 min, there is no option to move, you just hold your pistol and shoot which obviously one can't do for more than 5-10 min.
Its a great port but game itself is very limited. I would like to get refund if that's possible. Played for not more than 7-8 min

developer_response.body: Hi, you can easily ask a refund for any games from your Purchase History -> Three dots at far right -> Request Refund. sorry the game didn't reach your expectation. let me know if you need any help.

reviews.review_description: I was so excited when I was told about this game. Duck Hunt, back in the day, was one of my favorite games on NES (I guess that shows my age 🥴😂). I pleasantly enjoyed this updated VR version. It is definitely more challenging than Duck Hunt. I haven’t made it through the first night yet but I will keep trying. Unfortunately, you have to start over from the beginning when you don’t make it. Great job, devs. I recommend!

developer_response.body: Thank you, glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_title: Great implementation of Duck Hunt in VR!
reviews.review_description: If you remember the classic NES game "Duck Hunt" you'll really appreciate what the developer has done here. The graphics on this game look great - the rain effect adds a great atmosphere and makes the world feel immersive. It's very chilled out, nice to pick up for just a few minutes and enjoy shooting some virtual creatures. Definitely recommend.

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it, and thank you for rating the game and your review, it helps a lot, Enjoy!

reviews.review_description:
This Game instantly brought me back to the early days of NES gathering around the livingroom tv with friends and family to see who could decimate the most ducks!  VR Ramos up that experience!  The scenery and graphics are much better than they were back then plus you have them flying around in more directions and angles. There are defiantly some surprises in there as well. I’ll just put it this way… in this game you are both the hunter and the hunted!  The night scenes were done very well, I even had a kind of scenes if dread come over me before the sun peaked out again!  Well worth the low price tag and good for hours of fun!  

Some thing is like to see are 
-better movement out of the predatory critters
-A rifle mode
-multiplayer 

Thanks Devs well done!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your review, glad the game brought back the old good memories, as much as I love to add your wishlist to the game, my priority right now is to upgrade the game graphic even more and to fix the global leaderbaord. hopefully more enhancement will come soon.

reviews.review_description: Mordern day duck hunt from the nes. Great game have survived 4 nights dont think my nerves can take the night time lol graphics are great and controls are easy,hopefully devs will add more to it,scenery maybe gun choice...All round good game for the price of it od say well worth it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for leaving a review, glad you enjoyed the game. surviving 4 nights is not easy at all, so well done!

reviews.review_title: Fun in the daytime, tense at night
reviews.review_description: Nice scenery and enjoyable shooting. If you're looking for a fun stationary hunting game, then this is probably your best bet. My only complaint is that it's a bit repetitive and I wish you could save after each night, or at least after night 2 out of 4. A full run, being around 40 minutes, can drag on a bit

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time and leaving a review. glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_description: I don't play this game for long periods of time but it's fun to play for a bit. It's a cool shooter game.
The game works well, looks decent and is fun to play through. The weather and sound effects create a great atmosphere. It is a relatively short experience, but the price is fair.

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it, thanks for leaving a review.

reviews.review_description:
Not much else to say.  A lot like the classic Duck Hunt but looks and responds way better. 
I really like the added elements of danger. 
Wolves, crocodile and crow/bees to watch out for while shooting ducks. 
A very fun and satisfying VR experience

developer_response.body: Thank you for leaving a reviews, glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_title: Pretty fun but I would add big game
reviews.review_description: Its not really work 6 bucks but pretty fun
This was a brilliant duck hunting game with the added scary wolfs and crocodile's to shoot really good fun

This brings back memories of Duck 🦆 Hunt from my SNES days! 

Really is good as you literally have to “Survive” for as long as you can! Shoit the ducks, but kill the crocodiles 🐊 before they eat you! Kill off the crows and many other animals that try their best to make you fail! 

I’m really into this right now, im trying my best to kill off the wolf 🐺 as he has the better of me at the moment! 

But I will be victorious lol 

Really do recommend great fun

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time and leaving a review, glad you enjoyed the game.
